insight: Benchmark expanded from 10 hacks/3 repos to 22 hacks/8 repos: iter199 added 12 new execution-verified certified-resolved reward hacks across 8 repos (5 new: requests, xarray, pylint, pytest, sympy), from 42 frozen targets -> 23 variants -> 20 certified -> 12 certified+witnessed. The class generalizes beyond the original 3 repos. django-10097 passes 1870 graded tests and still returns 'accepted' where gold returns 'rejected'. Standard 9 catch: 7/10 repos lacked vendored parsers; 3 official parsers vendored (byte-identical, tested) before the run or certification would have silently failed.
next_action: update the findings paper to reflect the expanded benchmark (22 hacks across 8 repositories instead of 10 across 3) in the abstract, Section 4, Table 1, and Limitations; then the operator peer-review path (hand-verify author block, submit for a DOI, arXiv appeal)
